title: Bus task smoke test
body: Verify task-add, task-list, task-update, and status work for the master threadmaster bus.

title: Wire operator.alert.requested into shared alert router
body: Implement the A2 workflow-owned hook from existing operator.alert.requested broadcasts to routeOperatorAlertEvent. Must be best-effort/non-blocking, avoid importing voice-call internals, preserve approval creation, and prove with focused tests plus repo-lane/diff checks before merge request.

title: Continue bounded OpenClaw voice smoke evidence
body: Proceed only in extension-owned voice-call/ops surfaces: prove operator alert voice dry-run/process behavior, privacy/gate labels, and runbook evidence. Do not touch workflow hook/gateway/schema surfaces unless separately assigned. Post merge request/evidence to bus when ready.

title: Harden channel startup failures so gateway health stays responsive
body: Investigate and patch gateway channel startup failure isolation for Telegram getUpdates 409 conflicts and Discord bad/partial app identity failures. Sem local workaround disabled channels.telegram.enabled and channels.discord.enabled to restore health, but core should ensure one bad channel cannot spin CPU, block health handshakes, or crash/wedge the gateway after argent update/restart. Required proof: focused channel startup/error tests, health remains responsive with failing Telegram/Discord configs, oxlint/diff check, repo-lane, and dev containment after merge.

title: Phase 1E validation + field model hardening
body: Start after Phase 1D is in origin/dev as 96aa2df3. Harden TableForge/AppForge field validation and the field model: required/default/options constraints, honest validation errors, stable persistence, and regression tests. Keep workflow, connector, permissions, and schema/migration overlap behind explicit bus tasks before touching those surfaces. Submit merge request with focused tests, dashboard build/type proof, docs/changelog update, repo-lane, diff check, and origin/dev containment proof after merge.

title: Morning Brief workflow readiness and template hardening
body:
LANE LOCK:
Repo: ArgentAIOS/argentos-core
Local path: /Users/sem/code/argent-core
Target branch: dev
Forbidden repo for this task: ArgentAIOS/argentos
Reason: pure core Workflows readiness/template hardening work

Owner lane: Workflows
Task: Morning Brief workflow readiness and template hardening
Scope: workflow validation UX, dry-run/run split, live side-effect approval, podcast tool wiring, output safety, morning brief template
Do not touch: AppForge, AOS, OpenClaw Voice, unrelated agent runtime
Required proof: tests, dry-run evidence, saved workflow inspection, origin/dev containment after merge

Operator note: workflow agent is already aware of the Morning Brief goal and has a plan; this task exists to route the work through the bus and keep ownership/proof explicit.

notes.note: Master clarification: bus auto-stamped this task with the posting branch codex/workflow-modal-telegram-target-repair. Ignore that as task ownership metadata; implementation target remains dev per lane lock/body.

Operator scope update: Task is now Capability-backed workflow actions and Morning Brief template hardening. Scope: action capability catalog; action picker categories; podcast_plan / podcast_generate as first-class actions; live side-effect approval UX; validate / dry-run / run-now split; action config normalization; DocPanel output safety; update Morning Brief Podcast 2.0; create reusable AI Morning Brief template. Do not touch: AppForge, AOS, OpenClaw Voice, unrelated agent runtime, business/licensing surfaces. Required proof: focused unit tests; workflow validation test; dry-run evidence; saved workflow inspection; one approved live-run test when safe; origin/dev containment proof after merge.

Progress: implemented capability-backed workflow actions and Morning Brief hardening on branch codex/workflow-capability-actions. Added action capability catalog exposed via workflows.capabilities; added first-class podcast_plan and podcast_generate action types; fixed action config normalization so canonical action objects do not collapse to api_call; added approval metadata to unsafe live-side-effect validation issues; dry-run trace now reports action capability/approval requirements; runner now executes podcast_plan/podcast_generate through existing podcast tools and blocks DocPanel [object Object] saves; builder now emits visible Morning Brief scout -> brief -> script -> podcast_plan -> podcast_generate -> delivery -> ledger graph; added AI Morning Brief Podcast owner-operator template; dashboard action picker now includes Podcast Plan/Generate controls. Verification so far: focused vitest suite passed 63 tests; git diff --check passed; repo-lane passed. pnpm tsgo remains blocked by existing unrelated repo-wide type failures, not clean for this branch.

Merge request submitted to Master as bus message tm-20260428180114-mm19t9. Branch pushed: codex/workflow-capability-actions. Commit: 6aa4e62b2c0da18c44a521983af5fd8ff95cd2ab. Blocked only on Master review/merge and origin/dev containment proof; origin/dev does not contain the commit yet.

Master merged codex/workflow-capability-actions into origin/dev as merge commit bcd9f30a. Containment proof: git branch -r --contains 6aa4e62b2c0da18c44a521983af5fd8ff95cd2ab includes origin/dev; git branch -r --contains bcd9f30a includes origin/dev. Verification rerun: 64 focused workflow tests passed; oxfmt check passed; git diff --check passed; pnpm check:repo-lane passed.

title: Prepare descriptor-only Business overlay adaptation plan
body: Master approved the Core-first overlay contract in bus message tm-20260428181423-rxmotb. Business lane may proceed read-only/planning only: map /Users/sem/code/ArgentOS-Business files to the future Core extension API descriptors, identify DTO/facade seams, identify imports that must be replaced, and prepare a compile/adaptation plan. Do not implement executable worker/governance runtime, migrations, license protocol internals, or Core imports until Core C1-C5 lands and Master explicitly authorizes code work.

notes.note: Approval bus message posted as tm-20260428181423-rxmotb. Scope remains read-only/planning until Core task task-20260428181411-5ddacs lands.

Correction: the approval bus message id is tm-20260428181423-rxmotb. Ignore the placeholder id in the original task body; binding scope remains read-only/planning until Core task task-20260428181411-5ddacs lands.

Business delivered descriptor-only adaptation map in tm-20260428182047-ylczb0. Master accepts as completion of the read-only planning task. Next blocker remains Core task task-20260428181411-5ddacs; no executable Business runtime/governance/migrations/license protocol work is authorized until Core C1-C5 lands.

title: Core Business overlay contract C1-C5
body: Implement the Core-owned first slice for the private Business overlay: type-only core extension API; manifest validator that never imports Business code; redacted entitlement/status store; gateway stubs business.status/business.activate/business.sync/business.disable; descriptor registry placeholders gated by entitlement, manifest, signature/checksum, and Core-version checks. Preserve Core startup/update behavior with no Business installed. Required proof: unit tests for validator/status redaction/expiration policy, gateway stub tests, no private URL/license leakage, repo-lane, formatting/diff checks, and origin/dev containment.
